trajectory.reasoning:
WHAT YOU FOUND: The Comments History section contains no staff notes, no customer comments, and no recorded issues (0 entries). Order shows 1 item (Sample Product, SKU PRODUCT-001) shipped and invoiced in full for $88.87 with $0.00 refunded as of Apr 18, 2025.
WHERE YOU FOUND IT: Order #000000556 → Comments History tab (/admin/sales/order/view/order_id/556/#comments_history) and Items Ordered section.
WHY IT MATTERS: The customer claims 'This isn't what I ordered,' but there is no documented discrepancy, prior complaint, or staff note confirming an incorrect item. Without evidence or notes supporting a mismatch, a refund cannot be approved outright. Escalation is required to request additional details (e.g., photos of received item, confirmation of SKU mismatch) before issuing a credit memo.
